title: Testkit Provider Compliance
subtitle: Provider × compliance test — every implementer of a provider interface runs the same suite
purpose: The contract claim: any provider in any package must pass arcana-testkit's runComplianceSuite. v0.1.0 ships with one provider (libsql) and one placeholder test, just to prove the harness wires up.

providers.v0_1_target: Real connection + storeMemory/getMemory round-trip; other methods throw NotImplementedError

tests.label: storeMemory then getMemory returns the same Memory

providers.v0_1_target: Not in v0.1 — placeholder row to show the suite scales
